title: Polyglot Compiler Color Theme
description: Schema for a single .polytheme.json color theme file.

name.description: Human-readable theme name shown in the Theme Manager UI.

type.description: Coarse category used for icon themes and OS-side hints.

author.description: Author or organisation that maintains this theme.

description.description: Long-form description shown in the Theme Manager metadata pane.

extends.description: Optional parent theme id; inherited colors are applied first, then this theme's colors override them.

qss.description: Optional path (relative to the theme file) to a sibling Qt Style Sheet that further customises individual widgets.

colors.description: Workbench color tokens. Keys follow VS Code dotted naming. Values must be 6- or 8-digit hex colors with leading '#'.

tokenColors.description: Editor syntax tokens. Each entry maps one or more TextMate-style scopes to color/font settings.

fontStyle.description: Space-separated combination of: normal, bold, italic, underline.
